notes: First-contact visibility check: after one trivial turn the dashboard shows WHICH model the session runs and HOW FULL its context is. claudecode carries everything in the transcript the daemon tails: message.model → ModelName (the DEFAULT boot model — no --model flag; the pinned-model variant is 5.2), usage tokens → TotalTokens, and the window from raw.context_management.context_window or the alias table → ComputeContextUtilization > 0. The phase DSL asserts the state arc; the model assertion is evidenced by the staged-replay golden AFTER turn_end. Recorded in DEFAULT (non-coexist) mode: claudecode hooks POST to the hardcoded :7837, so the production daemon was stopped for the recording window (#599).

text: Turn completes back to ready; SessionMetrics.ModelName is the default boot model (not 'unknown') and context utilization > 0 (window from context_management or the alias table)
